title: Verification methodology with worked cases

stage13_round2_summary: Round-2 Stage-13 review confirmed 5 of 6 round-1 BLOCKER fixes (1.1, 1.2, 1.3, 4.1, 9.1) clean. Round-1 3.1 fix landed at name-correctness level only — §5 still asserted gapped_interface_axiom, chirality_limitation_zero, chiral-central-charge group, and EWBaryogenesisChiralityWall theorem suite all in AXIOM_METADATA, but only gapped_interface_axiom (L1351) is. chirality_limitation_zero (L1483) is in PLACEHOLDER_THEOREMS; L1591 and L1633 are in HYPOTHESIS_REGISTRY. The 6-tier eliminability vocabulary cited as AXIOM_METADATA's was actually the union across 3 registries. 1 BLOCKER (3.1-residual on cross-registry attribution), 4 REQUIRED, 1 RECOMMENDED. Round-3 re-review required after BLOCKER fix.
stage13_round3_summary: Round-3 Stage-13 review verified the §5 cross-registry attribution fix deterministically. All three pillar anchors now correctly attributed: (i) c_minus_equals_8Nf in HYPOTHESIS_REGISTRY (L1590, tier algebraic); (ii) gapped_interface_axiom in AXIOM_METADATA (L1351, tier hard); (iii) chirality_limitation_zero in PLACEHOLDER_THEOREMS (L1483) plus H_KLRS_SM_Crossover in HYPOTHESIS_REGISTRY (L1627). Four-table landscape enumerated with per-registry tier sets. §11 Phase 6f filename em-dash drift verified remediated (LaTeX --- + clarifying note). Round-2 BLOCKER 3.1-residual + RECOMMENDED 5.1 fully closed. Outcome: 0 open BLOCKERs; 4 advisories carried forward (1.4 citation cache empty, 7.1 BundleRiemannAux sub-count, 5.2 line-range off-by-one — all acknowledged non-blocking; 3.1-r3 new minor RECOMMENDED on BORDISM_HYPOTHESES tier set under-listing 'algebraic' at H2 Shapiro side-channel). Verdict GREEN.
